subject: Congress must take bold action on climate change
body:
**[Congress must take bold action on climate change](http://demolinks.us/c/s/EFw/5J8je/6/5e/r5cs/6ZUCLO/CXQhxq3ct/P)**
_The petition to Congress reads:_
**" It is long past time for Congress to take bold action on climate change. Pass the 100 by '50 Act sponsored by Sens. Jeff Merkley and Bernie Sanders to phase out fossil fuel use by 2050."**
Add your name:
[ ](http://demolinks.us/c/s/EFw/5J8je/s/5e/r5cs/6ZUCLO/67VD5QQ3Gw/P)
---
Dear Activist,
[ ](http://demolinks.us/c/s/EFw/5J8je/v/5e/r5cs/6ZUCLO/zilOI4CSDm/P)
---
With every passing day, the climate crisis continues spinning out of control, and the Trump administration is in full denial mode. As Trump filled his cabinet with climate deniers and fossil fuel executives, the Earth experienced yet another hottest year on record and the highest levels of CO2 in 3 million years.1,2
Progressive champions Sens. Jeff Merkley and Bernie Sanders have just introduced the 100 By '50 Act, sweeping climate legislation to wean the United States completely off fossil fuels by 2050.
**It 's long past time for action to reverse the catastrophic havoc climate change has wreaked on the Earth. We must demand Congress act on this legislation before it gets any worse.**
**[Stand with Sens. Merkley and Sanders: Pass the 100 by 50 climate bill immediately. Click here to sign the petition.](http://demolinks.us/c/s/EFw/5J8je/z/5e/r5cs/6ZUCLO/vdiDXF5R8V/P)**
**The 100 by 50 Act is the first legislation introduced in Congress that would eliminate fossil fuel use in the United States entirely.** Specifically, the bill would:
* Require all electric utilities to begin phasing out fossil fuel use in 2021 and stop burning fossil fuels entirely by 2050.
* Provide grants for clean energy, energy efficiency and public transportation projects to low income communities.
* Help workers currently employed in the fossil fuel industry find employment in the industries of the future.
* Make major investments in zero emissions vehicles.
* End new fossil fuel infrastructure investments like the Dakota Access and Keystone XL pipelines.
* Impose a carbon duty on carbon-intensive products imported from other countries.

Although this legislation is not perfect, it's the best climate bill we have right now and is a critical starting point that provides an opportunity to organize and build support for the bold action we need in Congress.
As tens of thousands of activists pour into streets around the world to march against Trump's dangerous climate denial agenda and for immediate action to solve the climate crisis, we must speak out and support this important first step to push for a comprehensive solution to save our planet.
**Stand with Sens. Merkley and Sanders: Pass the 100 by 50 climate bill immediately. Click the link below to sign the petition:**
**[https://act.credoaction.com/sign/100_by_50](http://demolinks.us/c/s/EFw/5J8je/U/5e/r5cs/6ZUCLO/M6VqkIsTL/P)**
Thanks for all you do.
Josh Nelson, Deputy Political Director
[CREDO Action from Working Assets](http://demolinks.us/c/s/EFw/5J8je/j/R/r5cs/6ZUCLO/sMKybscdV0/P)
Add your name:
[ ](http://demolinks.us/c/s/EFw/5J8je/5/5e/r5cs/6ZUCLO/6gOovKJXkT/P)
---
References
1. Jugal K. Patel, "[How 2016 Became Earth's Hottest Year on Record](http://demolinks.us/c/s/EFw/5J8je/r/53/r5cs/6ZUCLO/sVyWS7UwFe/P)," The New York Times, Jan. 18, 2017.
2. Nicola Jones, "[How the World Passed a Carbon Threshold and Why It Matters](http://demolinks.us/c/s/EFw/5J8je/Y/5W/r5cs/6ZUCLO/v1AFX9j5eM/P)," Yale Environment 360, Jan. 26, 2017.

body:

TrumpCare 3.0 could be voted on as early as TODAY.

Just like their last failed attempts, Republicans are rushing to pass the latest half-baked version of their awful health care bill that could leave millions of Americans without health insurance. You know how we know it's awful? They are even trying to exempt themselves from one of its most harmful provisions that would gut crucial protections for people with pre-existing conditions.

Now, if they don't want it for themselves, why in the world would they want to make Americans have it? Oh, that's right, because Republican politicians don't give two cents about people.

body:
I'd like to know what you think of my first 100 days in office. |
[](http://click1.action.gop.com/wfftnqlhsyfbgqgqbwmwlbklzkbhzzwmtvgwvdkdvlzffv_tmzlmmjccwv.html?a=86189&b=17786605)

Peter,

It has been a historic first 100 days.

I'm honored to be your voice in the White House, and I'm even more honored to work to return the power of government to you, the American people.

Now, I'd like to know what you think. I'd like to know your thoughts, concerns, and feelings on our accomplishments over the last 100 days.

[**Please, to ensure we have your input during this important milestone, take my First 100 Days Approval Survey today.**](http://click1.action.gop.com/twldmfztcgwkvfvfkbrbzkszjsktjjbrdhvbhlslhzjwwb_tmzlmmjccwv.html?a=86189&b=17786605)

With the world watching, Peter, we have...
* Taken strong action against our adversaries and sent a message that the United States is no longer complacent to ISIS.

* Appointed a strong conservative, Associate Justice Neil Gorsuch, to the Supreme Court to uphold and defend our Constitution and replace the great late Justice Antonin Scalia.

* Eliminated two former regulations for every new federal regulation in efforts to increase government efficiency.

* Lifted Obama-Clinton roadblocks that have allowed critical energy projects, like the Keystone Pipeline, to move forward.

* Signed an executive order to BUY AMERICAN, HIRE AMERICAN to protect the US from unfair industry competition.

...and much, much more.
This era of government is controlled by you, the American people, and I want to make sure you have every chance to be involved in our agenda.

[**Please, make it a priority to take my First 100 Days Approval Survey today to let me know what you think.**](http://click1.action.gop.com/ymlpbrlwgzmnkrkrnftflnylcynwccftpqkfqsysqlcmmk_tmzlmmjccwv.html?a=86189&b=17786605)

Thank you for your efforts in making America great again, Peter. I'm glad you're with me.

Sincerely,

President of the United States

name: Jill Vogel for Lieutenant Governor
subject: Sen. Steve Newman Endorses Jill Vogel for Lieutenant Governor
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Vogel for Virginia45 North Hill Drive, Suite 100Warrenton, VA 20186
body:
Newman recognizes Vogel as a leader who gets things done
---
| | | | | |
---
| | |
---
| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE
May 3, 2017
Senator Steve Newman Endorses Jill Vogel for Lieutenant GovernorNewman Recognizes Vogel as a Leader who Gets Things DoneWARRENTON, VA - Today, Senator Jill Vogel, Republican candidate for Lieutenant Governor, received the endorsement of Senator Steve Newman, who serves as President Pro Tempore of the Senate of Virginia."In Virginia's Senate, Jill Vogel is known as someone who gets things done," said Senator Steve Newman. "Whether leading the fight against Obamacare's mandate or making Virginia better for job creation, Jill is known for carrying some of the biggest bills of the greatest importance to our Commonwealth. Although I'll miss her as a colleague, I am proudly endorsing Jill Vogel for Lieutenant Governor because Virginia needs effective leadership with a proven track record of getting results. I would ask every Republican to please join me in voting for Jill Vogel on June 13th."
"I am honored to have the support and confidence of Senator Newman," responded Senator Jill Vogel. "Earning the support of our President Pro Tempore is a distinct honor. During his service, Steve has had the privilege of working with many strong leaders in the Senate. I could not be more grateful to have his support for my campaign to bring transformative leadership to Richmond and get things done to create jobs, grow our economy, and defend our constitutional rights."
As the Senate President Pro Tempore, Senator Steve Newman is a key Republican leader in the Virginia Senate. During his service, Steve has been an advocate for free enterprise, transportation improvements, and the values important to his district. Steve has been a leader on education reform through increasing parental choice and student opportunity while introducing key measures to bring additional oversight, transparency, and fiscal accountability to Virginia's schools.
###

name: Chrissy Harbin
subject: A great leap forward
body:
| |
---
| | | | Hi Peter, Some encouraging news to share with you - As you likely know, comprehensive tax reform has been a huge priority for Americans For Prosperity. I know that you have followed closely as we've sought to refine this plan and remove harmful provisions like the Border Adjustment Tax. _The blueprint released last week by President Trump represents a major step toward achieving that priority_ . In fact, [we told reporters](http://click.myprosperitymail.com/?qs=5f6c4edf872271aa7966bd26270b09ef6d9e4dbacbe005ca1fd9c9ece9c6df2326de051989f4fd7399695ec706efb97b867c42c471403071 "we told reporters") it's a "giant leap" in the right direction for our tax code. In particular, we are encouraged to see:
* **No Border Adjustment Tax**. This 20% tax would raise the prices of everyday household products - a devastating new cost for many Americans, especially those who live on fixed incomes. Getting rid of this idea will help keep costs lower;
* **Reduced Corporate Income Tax Rate**. This move will allow American businesses to hire, invest, and innovate, giving them a competitive edge in our global marketplace;
* **Reduced Individual Income Tax Rate**. This reduction allows you to spend, save, or invest more of your hard-earned wages;
* **Elimination of Death and Gift Taxes**. This move will prevent the government from unjustly pillaging your life savings.

We look forward to continuing to work with the Trump Administration and Congress to promote comprehensive tax reform that will improve your life, make America a better place to do business, and ease the financial burden on your family. Thank you for your support. We'll continue to keep you updated as this plan makes its way through Congress.
---
| | For Freedom,

Chrissy Harbin | Vice President of External Affairs | Americans For Prosperity
1310 N. Courthouse Road, Suite 700, Arlington, VA 22201

---

name: Caitlin Mitchell, EMILY's List
subject: [Livestream] Elizabeth Warren, Maxine Waters, and more >>
body:
We elect pro-choice Democratic women who will fight for women and families. | [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7f94/24c69fd9/edaea00d/18e5fee7/2194784830/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WQENE506N_digital_email_20170503_WAELive_inact&source=WQENE506N_digital_email_20170503_WAELive_inact")
---

Peter,

We're just moments away from the We Are EMILY Conference and Gala, our annual event to honor pro-choice Democratic champions across the country.

There's a fantastic lineup of speakers and honorees this year, and I want to make sure you're part of it.

We'll be livestreaming some of the day's must-see moments during the conference and gala on Facebook Live.

**[Want to watch? Make sure you're following EMILY's List on Facebook to get today's highlights.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7f94/24c69fd9/edaea00d/18e5fee0/2194784830/VEsE/ "https://www.facebook.com/emilyslist/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+Want+to+watch+Make+sure+youre+following+&utm_campaign=WQENE506N_digital_email_20170503_WAELive_inact&source=WQENE506N_digital_email_20170503_WAELive_inact")**

Here's what we'll be streaming throughout the day:

At 12:50 p.m. ET, you can see a panel with our incredible 2017 Gabrielle Giffords Rising Star Award nominees.

At 2:25 p.m. ET, we'll livestream a nuts-and-bolts panel on what we're doing to help more candidates win state and local races.

And from the evening celebration, starting around 7:25 p.m. ET, you can see speeches from EMILY's List President Stephanie Schriock, Senator Elizabeth Warren, Congresswoman Maxine Waters, and our 2017 Rising Star, Philadelphia City Councilwoman Helen Gym.

**Make sure to follow us on Facebook so you don't miss a single moment:**

**[https://www.facebook.com/emilyslist/](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7f94/24c69fd9/edaea00d/18e5fee1/2194784830/VEsF/ "https://www.facebook.com/emilyslist/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=3+-+httpswwwfacebookcomemilyslist&utm_campaign=WQENE506N_digital_email_20170503_WAELive_inact&source=WQENE506N_digital_email_20170503_WAELive_inact")**

Enjoy!

Caitlin Mitchell,
Vice President of Digital, EMILY's List

P.S. Don't worry if you're busy during any of the events. The videos will be archived on our Facebook page where you can watch them any time!

[](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7f94/24c69fd9/edaea00d/18e5fee2/2194784830/VEsC/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=4&utm_campaign=WQENE506N_digital_email_20170503_WAELive_inact&source=WQENE506N_digital_email_20170503_WAELive_inact")

from Kellyanne Conway.

Yes, your purchase to our May 18th Spring to Victory Annual
Dinner ( http://email.robly.com/wf/click?upn=5MdO6cLza2MazVJVOHyurva-2BR3ZynZFmQQsOtkDLtzhK6jhIpM9-2FPXc-2B7bPYHTWx_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCFb47pW8iDRAYLsM9sf9wIa92fG-2FsxU68zXzzMA2nO2VCunl2bm-2FhLXsWS8P3XITs28GUU7Mnlu37POPaWv9myv4YWBbFU9plZi0-2B42tZfBaUujH4mxA3e6jOiyDa5q6HKz45-2B17g6DUNL-2BnIMAR30MO2z0jm8c-2FOLCubBi9UVKqXzRjTy7mS0u4p-2BEMGPx8JbQMqJvpgB1NIhv5JuDTD1SZx9cOwk7QYCqHiUCWCOrH2JTQxCfd9ml8pBid-2FdQxq1dw2G6IPSFKasOOZQfSBDTbZXc0avPWtxqfUwxUU5eyKZI-2BZjzbXayQaBxkvPoo-2F3-2B91-2FSS63kttuBlacGkC-2BOC04aP-2BJnmk1UwCUNVEX1UtOkExGu2u4qJl6ldYYVpJAzc2r-2FsWzhl8VhiNPTBTMOAmTd0pOGm96lCE66l3QTZw-3D-3D ) not only means a

--We are battling for 3 State Rep. seats and a State Senate seat
in some upcoming special elections. We must protect
our hard-fought victories and make gains in the legislature!

--We have already begun planning and implementing our 2018
Victory Program and budget.

Republican leaders

--Our communications initiatives: This includes our weekly
newsletter ( http://email.robly.com/wf/click?upn=5MdO6cLza2MazVJVOHyurtkBEAgSnJYmCyfukURSFv6w6a1z7ahnvgzTaWOLNaFw_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCFb47pW8iDRAYLsM9sf9wIa92fG-2FsxU68zXzzMA2nO2VCunl2bm-2FhLXsWS8P3XITs28GUU7Mnlu37POPaWv9myv4YWBbFU9plZi0-2B42tZfBaUujH4mxA3e6jOiyDa5q6HKz45-2B17g6DUNL-2BnIMAR30MO2z0jm8c-2FOLCubBi9UVKqXzRjTy7mS0u4p-2BEMGPx8JbQMqJvpgB1NIhv5JuDTD1SZx9cOwk7QYCqHiUCWCOrHytvSd9CxppsGTGw42ZGZ6d87fShyUbaoIQLU4eyy0APdHod6G-2F2cgwhejqDRtoA8p8j-2BrR3yVFZWN1hRqHE72wc6OW9-2F7CJ-2BGGi0Wj3WDR-2F03H4DfZwRa4LcNEBBBi7vBjeyseruSclbDbsyRYgiL74R4UG5xSFPU-2FeUEka52v67ggXPnBmXny9aXcS4YDWKw-3D-3D ), our coordination with
the House, Senate, & Corner Office on messaging, our informative
website, and keeping Republicans engaged & informed on social
media and with letters to the editor.

These initiatives will go a long way to help grow our majorities
in the State House, Senate, and Executive Council. And they will
help us keep Governor Sununu in the Corner Office.

Join us for an evening with old friends, new friends, and
your Party!

( http://email.robly.com/wf/click?upn=5MdO6cLza2MazVJVOHyurva-2BR3ZynZFmQQsOtkDLtzhK6jhIpM9-2FPXc-2B7bPYHTWx_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCFb47pW8iDRAYLsM9sf9wIa92fG-2FsxU68zXzzMA2nO2VCunl2bm-2FhLXsWS8P3XITs28GUU7Mnlu37POPaWv9myv4YWBbFU9plZi0-2B42tZfBaUujH4mxA3e6jOiyDa5q6HKz45-2B17g6DUNL-2BnIMAR30MO2z0jm8c-2FOLCubBi9UVKqXzRjTy7mS0u4p-2BEMGPx8JbQMqJvpgB1NIhv5JuDTD1SZx9cOwk7QYCqHiUCWCOrH6W9hswz0NbTLl53v3jwJOaiT2eBSgxExKd3-2FSBfeFtslenhQjU0VGyoaYJ4TlXWBUG-2FRilQ7h-2BPI6J-2B78kz7Plhsm2nNIbkyZ3jByYOhRlQDArBf6lw0PQJdtS0pa-2BpojHxxkNtxyRtumr9Ll1kjmRCAT6O8-2FQsRJeyA90JDa-2B-2BELGv0p-2Frn4ghlQQDhTKBoQ-3D-3D ); Send us a loud and

body:
Trump is strong arming undecided Republicans to pass health care repeal -- and it's working. Two key Republicans just flipped.
---
[****](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e092/2b07114c/5d8d40c1/736eb12f/1769734171/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IiJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/protect-our-care?source=PT-20170503-Rapid_DS-ProsHV&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=")
**_CNN: "Key GOP lawmakers flip on health care after Trump meeting"_ **
Team,

_CNN_ just reported:** "The White House is in a full-court press Wednesday to rally GOP support to repeal and replace Obamacare."**

And Trump's plan to strong arm undecided Republicans is working. Two key House Republicans flipped to support health care repeal today, which means the bill's chances of passing just got a whole lot stronger.

[**A health care vote could happen any day now and it 's critical we speak out to stop it. Add your name right now: tell the GOP not to repeal Obamacare.**](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e092/2b07114c/5d8d40c1/736eb12f/1769734171/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IiJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/protect-our-care?source=PT-20170503-Rapid_DS-ProsHV&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=")****

Trump reportedly got the two House Republicans on board today by promising a small amount of money for high-risk insurance pools.

But those pools provide no protection from the bill's horrific impact on Americans with pre-existing conditions, who would be forced to pay more for insurance that covers far less care.

The AARP called the new deal a "giveaway to insurance companies" and warned that it would do nothing to help Americans with pre-existing conditions.

Still, Trump is using it to bring more Republicans on board and ultimately pass the bill.

**Trump is building support and momentum among Republicans to repeal Obamacare, and we have to stop him before the bill comes up for a vote. Add your name right now to tell the GOP not to repeal Obamacare:**

name: urgent-alert@dscc.org
subject: This ad is powerful
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC, dscc
body:
No parent should ever have to decide whether or not they can afford to save their child.
---
[](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/protect-our-care?refcode=DPE-20170503-Urgent_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")
Team,

**No parent should ever have to decide whether or not they can afford to save their child.**

That's what Democrats are fighting for in the Senate. That's what's at risk with the health care repeal that just picked up _critical_ GOP votes in the House this morning.

**And that 's the message of our ad targeting key states in the health care fight:** No parent should have to decide whether or not they can afford to save their child.

More than ever, we think this is a message that needs to be heard.

[**Will you help us keep this ad going strong -- and stand with us in the fight for health care? Please rush a contribution of $1, or whatever you can afford, right now.**](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/protect-our-care?refcode=DPE-20170503-Urgent_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

[](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/protect-our-care?refcode=DPE-20170503-Urgent_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")
This ad is powerful, team. Rachel Maddow even called it a "gut-punch" of an ad -- and it's because every parent we know would give EVERYTHING for their children.

But should they have to?

Before Obamacare, a child who was born with a health condition could be denied health insurance or life-saving care because insurance companies could label it a "pre-existing condition."

name: Shannon Jackson, Our Revolution
subject: Standing up to Betsy DeVos
body:
With the most unqualified Secretary of Education in our country's history pushing for-profit charter schools, local school board members are more important to our children than ever before.
#
Friends,
Our public schools need your support. With the most unqualified Secretary of Education in our country's history pushing for-profit charter schools, local school board members are more important to our children than ever before. **Steve Zimmer** , **Imelda Padilla** , **Rita Moore** , **Lori Kirkpatrick** , and **Valdez Bravo** are running to strengthen public schools, and with their records of community activism, advocacy, and a robust, student-centric platform, we are proud to endorse them.
[**Will you split a $5 contribution to help support some of these great candidates and Our Revolution to protect our public schools from Secretary of Education Betsy DeVos' harmful policies?**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/24fb0d16/43f17890/db6accb0/6203a6e3/1064888684/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/or-natlschoolboard?refcode=em170503-full")
**Steve Zimmer** is President of the Los Angeles Unified School District (LAUSD) Board of Education and represents District 4. He co-founded the Elysian Valley United Community Service Center, LAUSD Student Recovery Day, and a partnership with the Youth Policy Institute's FamilySource Center. Steve helped secure an $18 million dollar increase for the arts, and passed a Good Food Purchasing resolution for school meals while advocating for immigration reform, the DREAM Act, and establishing schools as safe zones for families facing deportation. Steve's public school reforms lift everyone up.
**Imelda Padilla** serves on the Los Angeles County Commission for Women and Girls and is running for the Los Angeles School Board's District 6 seat. Imelda's experience with the environmental justice group Pacoima Beautiful, organizing to raise the minimum wage with the Los Angeles Alliance for a New Economy, and founding the nonprofit Together We Do More to serve middle and high school students in the North East San Fernando Valley with higher education and professional development opportunities have all helped prepare her for the Board of Education.
**Rita Moore** is running to represent Zone 4 on the Portland Public School (PPS) Board. As a PPS and Parent Teacher Association organizing committee member, Rita is deeply involved to ensure that students like her child receive the good education that was her ticket out of poverty to a Ph.D degree. Her commitment to ending district-wide inequities in education is complemented by 15 years of involvement with PPS, experience that will help the School Board serve families like hers.
**Lori Kirkpatrick** is running to represent the 2nd District on the Dallas Independent School District Board of Trustees. She sees the economic disparity in District 2 in her job as a physician's assistant and serving on the planning and allocation committees at the Parkland Health and Hospital System. As the mother of a 2nd grader in a district that has 89 percent of its students living in high poverty, Lori decided to fight to stop school privatization and establish District 2 as a sanctuary district, with community school models and expanded access to early childhood education.
**Valdez Bravo** is running for the Portland Community College (PCC) Board of Directors. After serving in the Army, Valdez became the first in his family to attend college when he enrolled at PCC. He went on to graduate from Portland State University, and earned dual advanced degrees from Baylor University. Now working at a senior level in the Veterans Health Administration, Valdez's election would make him the first Latino and the only veteran on the current board of PCC. He has worked as an adjunct professor and advisory board member with the Electronic Engineering Technical program, and would bring an intimate and circumspect understanding of how to meet student needs if elected to the Board of Directors, including protecting PCC's sanctuary status for undocumented students, and supporting students, faculty, and staff to be successful.
[**Split a $5 contribution to help support some of these great candidates and Our Revolution and help counter Betsy DeVos' attacks on our public schools.**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/24fb0d16/43f17890/db6accb0/6203a6e3/1064888684/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/or-natlschoolboard?refcode=em170503-full")
With a vastly unqualified Secretary of Education who wants to shut down public education, revolutionizing the system is more important than ever. That's why your support today is so critical. Thank you for all that you do.
In solidarity,
Shannon Jackson
Executive Director
Our Revolution
**[DONATE»](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/24fb0d16/43f17890/db6accb0/6203a6e3/1064888684/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/or-natlschoolboard?refcode=em170503-full")**

_P.S.: We raise donations through ActBlue to help make it easier to donate to great progressive candidates. Lori Kirkpatrick and Steve Zimmer don 't use ActBlue, but they still need your help! Please considering contributing directly to [Lori](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/24fb0d16/43f17890/db6accb0/6203a6e0/1064888684/VEsC/ "https://www.crowdpac.com/campaigns/226721/join-me-in-supporting-public-education?source=ourrevolution") and [Steve](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/24fb0d16/43f17890/db6accb0/6203a6e1/1064888684/VEsD/ "https://act.myngp.com/Forms/-1329314031262496256?source=ourrevolution") to help make sure they win._

Help us continue transforming American politics and fighting for progressive candidates and causes by [contributing to Our Revolution here](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/24fb0d16/43f17890/db6accb0/6203a6ec/1064888684/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ourrevolution?refcode=email-footer-OR").
